headline: Purple Discussion Exposes “The NAC Lie”: How Stalled Network Enforcement Creates Critical Security Risks
summary: Manchester, LANCS, April 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Purple, the global leader in WiFi connectivity, has released an investigative discussion exposing “The NAC Lie”, the dangerous gap between Zero Trust theory and the reality of stalled network enforcement. You can watch the discussion on demand now. The session features industry heavyweight Chris Dedicoat, former EVP of Worldwide Sales & Operations at Cisco, alongside Purple’s Spencer Turner. headline: Cisco Joins Project Glasswing As AI Security Bets Shape CSCO Outlook
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has joined Project Glasswing alongside Anthropic, Amazon, and other major tech companies. The collaboration uses advanced AI models, including early access to Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview, to detect and address software vulnerabilities. Project Glasswing has already surfaced numerous security flaws that had not been identified through existing tools. Cisco Systems, best known for its networking, security, and collaboration products, is increasingly tying...

headline: Assessing Cisco Systems (CSCO) Valuation After AI Security Launches And Governance Changes
summary: Cisco Systems (CSCO) has been back in the spotlight after fresh AI focused security launches, a central role in Anthropic’s Project Glasswing, and new board appointments that reshaped governance expectations. See our latest analysis for Cisco Systems. The share price has climbed in recent months, with a 7.04% 1 month share price return and 12.57% 3 month share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of 50.35% and 5 year total shareholder return of 85.82% reflect the recent focus on...
